function.name: multilayer_statistics
function.description: Calculate comprehensive statistics for multiple layers including mean, std, correlation analysis, and cross-layer comparisons. Useful for understanding relationships between different datasets.

layer_names.description: List of layer names to analyze (minimum 2 layers required)

geographical_area.description: The geographical area to analyze (e.g., 'Beaufort Sea', 'Arctic Ocean', 'current view'). Defaults to current view if not specified.

time_range.description: Optional time range for temporal analysis

include_correlation.description: Whether to calculate correlation coefficients between layers (default true)

include_visualization.description: Whether to show analysis area on map (default false)

ui.title: Multi-Layer Statistical Analysis
ui.details: Computing comprehensive statistics and correlations across multiple layers
